title: Add servicing-side helper for cardmember lookup
author: tomas.reyes
head: tomas/cm-lookup-helper
description: Small helper used by SVC-3411 and three other tickets. Pulls the cardmember by external id and returns their tier + active-product list. Backed by the existing cardmember-svc client.

planted_bug.summary: cardmember_svc.lookup() returns None for unknown ids; the code accesses .tier and .products on the result without a None check. Any unknown id crashes the caller.

files.diff:
+from typing import Any
+
+from servicing.clients import cardmember_svc
+
+
+def get_member_summary(external_id: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
+    """Return tier + active-product list for the given external id.
+
+    Used by SVC-3411 (Standard launch scripts) and FRAUD-1120 (existing-
+    customer-relationship signal).
+    """
+    member = cardmember_svc.lookup(external_id)
+    return {
+        "tier": member.tier,
+        "products": [p.code for p in member.products if p.active],
+    }
